SensorScope Meteo column definitions (synthesized).

The Zenodo archive of the Grand-St-Bernard SensorScope deployment
(record 2654726, file stbernard-meteo.zip) does not ship a
column-definitions text file. The schema below is the standard
SensorScope "meteo" payload layout used by EPFL deployments and is
consistent with the data values observed in the Grand-St-Bernard
meteo files (9 measurement columns following the timestamp block).

References:
  Barrenetxea et al., "SensorScope: Out-of-the-Box Environmental
  Monitoring", IPSN 2008.
  Ingelrest et al., "SensorScope: Application-Specific Sensor
  Network for Environmental Monitoring", ACM TOSN 2010.

Column 1: Station ID
Column 2: Year
Column 3: Month
Column 4: Day
Column 5: Hour
Column 6: Minute
Column 7: Second
Column 8: Time since the epoch [s]
Column 9: Ambient Temperature [degree C]
Column 10: Surface Temperature [degree C]
Column 11: Solar Radiation [W/m^2]
Column 12: Relative Humidity [%]
Column 13: Soil Moisture [%]
Column 14: Watermark [kPa]
Column 15: Rain Meter [mm]
Column 16: Wind Speed [m/s]
Column 17: Wind Direction [degree]
